description: Fleet-wide Cove Data Protection backup health, billing, and storage trends from your terminal.

lifecycle.reason: Missing required package metadata (runtimeHint not provided and registryType='mcpb' not in the inference table)

name: io.github.Servosity/cove-mcp

environmentVariables.description: API-enabled backup.management user (Security Officer service account with the API flag). Exchanged via the Cove JSON-RPC Login method for a cached session visa.
environmentVariables.name: COVE_USERNAME

environmentVariables.description: Password for COVE_USERNAME. Exchanged once for a cached session visa; never written to disk beyond the local visa cache.
environmentVariables.name: COVE_PASSWORD

environmentVariables.description: Optional partner name to scope queries to a specific reseller or customer level. Defaults to the partner resolved from the login.
environmentVariables.name: COVE_PARTNER

environmentVariables.description: Optional override for the Cove JSON-RPC endpoint. Defaults to the standard backup.management API host; set only for a regional or mock endpoint.
environmentVariables.name: COVE_BASE_URL

title: Cove Data Protection MCP
